title: DEKTON 30M Hose Pipe & Nozzle Set | Durable 30 Meter Garden Hose with Adjustable Hose Nozzle | Ideal for Watering Plants, Cleaning, and More | Flexible, Kink-Resistant Hose with Leak-Free Fittings
features: Complete Garden Hose Set: The Dekton 30M Hose Pipe & Nozzle Set includes a flexible 30-meter garden hose and an adjustable hose nozzle, perfect for watering plants, cleaning, and general outdoor use. This all-in-one set provides a reliable solution for all your watering needs.

Durable & Kink-Resistant: Made from high-quality materials, the 30-meter hose is designed to be flexible and resistant to kinks, ensuring smooth water flow at all times. Its durable construction prevents wear and tear, providing long-lasting performance for your outdoor tasks.

Adjustable Hose Nozzle: The included hose nozzle features adjustable settings, allowing you to easily switch between various spray patterns. Whether you need a gentle mist for delicate plants or a powerful jet for cleaning, this nozzle has the right option for every task.

Leak-Free Fittings: Equipped with secure, leak-free fittings, this hose and nozzle set ensures a tight, reliable connection to taps and sprinklers. The strong fittings prevent water wastage, giving you efficient and effective watering for your garden or outdoor areas.

Versatile & Easy to Use: Suitable for a wide range of applications, from watering plants and lawns to washing vehicles and outdoor surfaces. The lightweight, flexible design makes the hose easy to maneuver, ensuring a hassle-free experience during every use.
description: The Dekton 30M Hose Pipe & Nozzle Set is your ultimate outdoor watering solution, designed to provide flexibility, durability, and ease of use. This set includes a 30-meter kink-resistant garden hose, ensuring smooth and uninterrupted water flow, and an adjustable hose nozzle with multiple settings for versatile watering options. Whether you’re gently misting delicate flowers or using a powerful jet for cleaning, the spray nozzle adapts to your needs. Crafted from durable materials, this hose withstands wear and tear, providing long-lasting use throughout the seasons. The secure, leak-free fittings prevent water wastage, ensuring efficient watering while saving water. Perfect for a wide range of outdoor tasks, including gardening, cleaning, and washing vehicles, the lightweight design makes it easy to handle. Upgrade your outdoor chores with the Dekton 30M Hose Pipe & Nozzle Set for a convenient, reliable watering experience.
